description: Baseline: 1327 tests in 22.14s. Top bottlenecks: UW 500 retry (7s real sleep), subprocess timeout (5s), IB connect retry (3s+1s), client ID allocation (1s).
Patch time.sleep in UW 500 test (-7s), IB connect retry tests (-4s), client ID allocation test (-1s), reduce subprocess timeout 5s→2s (-3s). Total: 22.14s → 7.11s (-68%)

asi.uw_500_fix: Added patch('time.sleep') around test_500_raises_server_error — 500 is retryable so client was sleeping 1+2+4=7s
asi.ib_retry_fix: Added @patch('time.sleep') to test_connect_retries_on_transient_error and test_connect_exhausts_retries — saved 4s total
asi.subprocess_fix: Reduced timeout from 5s to 2s for test_module_error_falls_back — the module fails fast, timeout is just a safety net
asi.remaining_top_tests: test_module_error (2s real subprocess), test_timeout_kills (0.5s), evaluate tests (0.3s each from import/mock overhead), batched_relay tests (0.1s each from asyncio.sleep)

description: Add pytest-xdist parallel execution (-n auto). 7.11s → 5.32s (-25%). Uses all CPU cores to run test files concurrently.

asi.method: pytest-xdist -n auto distributes test files across CPU cores
asi.note: xdist adds 12 extra warnings (harmless eventkit DeprecationWarning per worker)
asi.remaining_bottleneck: test_module_error_falls_back (2s real subprocess) is now the critical path in parallel

description: Replace slow subprocess test (trade_blotter.flex_query with 1s timeout) with fast json.tool invocation (0.07s). 5.32s → 4.37s (-18%).

asi.fix: test_module_error_falls_back now uses json.tool --no-such-arg which fails in 0.07s instead of waiting for 1s flex_query timeout
asi.test_still_tests: Still tests error extraction from run_module when process exits non-zero — same code path exercised
asi.remaining_bottlenecks: test_timeout_kills_process (0.5s real wait), evaluate tests (0.3s each from ThreadPoolExecutor), batched_relay (0.1s asyncio.sleep per test)
asi.parallel_overhead: xdist worker spawn adds ~2s base cost
